title: London, ENG — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

London is a city in ENG with a population of 8,799,800. A global financial and cultural capital with world-class museums, diverse neighborhoods, and unmatched career opportunities — but housing costs are steep.
